title: 理事長代理の評価アップ

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I watched your training session. Your team seems
to be putting in a reasonable amount of effort.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
It's good to see them striving to improve
themselves. Keep up the good work.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
One warning, though—make sure you always have
an eye on them.
